## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes with zero errors
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] No secrets or credentials in changed files
- [ ] Types are correct (no unresolved `any` without justification)
- [ ] Privileged routes are server-side gated (not just UI-hidden)
- [ ] Relevant documentation updated
- [ ] Tests added or existing tests updated (if applicable)
